---
title: Deep Document
format: html
_quarto:
  tests:
    html:
      ensureHtmlElements:
        - ["nav#TOC"]
      ensureFileRegexMatches:
        - ["Intro Author"]
        - ["Chapters Author"]
---

## First Section

This tests hierarchical directory metadata merging.

## Second Section

More content.

### Subsection

Should appear in TOC (toc-depth: 3 from deeper directory metadata).
